title: Manufacturing Engineer - Siemens India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Siemens India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
